content:
type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Done: added note/created/modified metadata params to trans parse(), stored in separate metadata dict (not variables), validated as string literals, continue's early like trimmed. _make_node() takes new metadata param, sets output_node.trans_metadata only when non-empty. My check sits right after the 'token.value in variables' duplicate check too, before assign/trimmed branches - same slot as your domain check but keyed on different token values (note/created/modified vs domain), so a merge is just two sequential if/continue blocks, no logical conflict. All 830 existing tests pass.
